page.headerDescription: Edit each block independently. Your public portfolio updates instantly.

restricted.title: My Agency
restricted.body: You don't have an approved agency yet, or you're not an active manager.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Logo, name, public URL and tagline shown on the portfolio.
identity.logoHint: 512×512px ideal. JPG, PNG or WebP, max 5MB. Appears as a seal in the portfolio hero.
identity.taglineDescription: Short phrase shown on the public portfolio below the name.

generalInfo.title: General information
generalInfo.description: Headquarters, founding year and the extended bio shown in the 'About the agency' section.
generalInfo.yearError: The year must be between 1800 and {max}.
generalInfo.aboutPlaceholder: Write the history, values and main focus of your agency...
generalInfo.aboutDescription: Long text, up to 4000 characters. Appears in the 'About the agency' block.

services.title: Services
services.description: Your agency's areas of work. Each service can have a title, icon, color and description. Up to {max}.
services.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe this service (what it includes, who it's for)...

reach.title: Operating reach
reach.description: Countries where your agency has active operations or associated representatives.
reach.maxHint: Up to {max} countries. Licenses are added per agent from their own profile.
reach.empty: You haven't defined the countries where the agency operates yet.

countries.title: Countries where you operate
countries.description: For each country in your reach, write a short narrative: experience, milestones, key teams. It appears on the public portfolio when the country is expanded.
countries.rowIntro: Briefly describe your experience operating in {country}. It shows in the portfolio's reach block when a visitor selects this country.
countries.fieldPlaceholder: E.g.: In {country} we've represented players since 2015 with a focus on the top division...

teamRelations.title: Teams you've worked with
teamRelations.description: Add clubs your agency has or had a relationship with. New entries go through admin review to verify the track record. They appear grouped by country on the public portfolio.
teamRelations.empty: You haven't added any teams yet. Tap the pencil to start a request.
teamRelations.relationDescriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: Player representation with the club since 2018, transfers and contract renewals.
teamRelations.notePlaceholder: Any context that helps verification (links, contacts, etc.)
teamRelations.errorAllValid: All teams must be chosen from the search or proposed with a required country.
teamRelations.confirmRemoveRelation: Remove this team from the portfolio?

contact.title: Contact & social
contact.description: Email, phone, website, verified link and social profiles shown on the portfolio.

media.catalogDescription: Up to {max} images to enrich the public portfolio (offices, team, events, presentations).
media.modalSubtitle: Up to 5 images (offices, team, events, presentations).
media.confirmDelete: Delete this image from the catalog?
media.emptyDescription: You haven't added photos to the agency catalog yet.

staff.pageDescription: Invite colleagues to your agency to collaboratively manage your players.
staff.invitationsDescription: Manage who has access to your agency's dashboard and players.
staff.inviteIntroPro: Send an invitation to other managers to join this agency. Once they accept, they'll be able to see all represented players and edit the agency profile.
staff.inviteIntroFree: The Free plan allows up to {cap} members (owner + colleagues + invitations). Activate Pro Agency to add unlimited.
staff.atCapNotice: You've reached the Free Agency plan limit. Activate Pro to add more colleagues.

structure.restrictedDescription: Enable or disable the content blocks of your public portfolio.
structure.restrictedBody: Only active agency managers can edit the public template.
structure.pageDescription: Enable or disable your portfolio blocks at /agency/[slug].
structure.blocksDescription: Each toggle publishes instantly on the public portfolio.
structure.errorToggle: An error occurred while trying to change visibility.

about.label: About the agency
about.description: Extended bio, stats, licenses and official validation.

staff.label: Team / Staff
staff.description: Managers and collaborators who make up the agency.

services.label: Services
services.description: List of professional services the agency offers.

reach.label: Global reach
reach.description: Countries where your agency operates or has representation.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.description: Agency images (offices, events, team). Up to 5 photos.

contact.label: Contact
contact.description: Email, phone, social media and final CTA.

styles.restrictedDescription: Configure the visual identity of your agency's public portfolio.
styles.restrictedBody: Only active agency managers can edit the public template.
styles.notFoundBody: No agency associated with your account was found.
styles.pageDescription: Choose the template, palette and typography your agency will be shown with.
styles.logoWarningBody: The Pro layout shows it as a seal on the cover. If you don't upload it, we use a monogram.
styles.logoWarningLink: Upload logo in the agency editor →
styles.templateDescription: One template per plan: Free Agency or Pro Agency.
styles.templateClassicDescription: Simple institutional card with logo, details and roster.
styles.templateProDescription: Cinematic hero with parallax, marquee and premium modules.
styles.upgradeLayoutNotice: Activate Pro Agency to use the cinematic layout with premium modules.
styles.paletteDescription: Apply a predefined palette or customize the corporate colors.
styles.heroDescription: Define the cinematic text that replaces the default name.
styles.heroHeadlineDescription: If you leave it empty, we use the agency name.
styles.heroTaglineDescription: Appears below the logo / monogram in the hero.
styles.livePreviewDescription: Quick view of the configured portfolio.
